title: Basic JavaScript Variables and Constants
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Variables and Constants. Focus on implementing var, let, const differences correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Variables and Constants
description: Create a function that uses var, let, const differences and Block scoping with let and const together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Variables and Constants Project
description: Build a small application that applies var, let, const differences, Block scoping with let and const, Variable hoisting in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Variables and Constants
description: The following code has bugs related to var, let, const differences. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Variables and Constants
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with var, let, const differences and Block scoping with let and const.
